data.body: ticket edit only supports --title, --priority, --assignee, and --ticket_type. It does not support --description, which means descriptions can only be set in the CREATE event data field. Investigate whether other fields (e.g., parent_id, status) are also missing from the EDIT command's allowed fields list. The reducer supports editing description via EDIT events (ticket-reducer.py lines 420-424), so the infrastructure exists — the CLI just doesn't expose it.
